subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by Thy Most Exalted Word, and by Thy Most Beautiful Names, and by the Manifestation of Thy Most Exalted Self [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک بالکلمه العلیا و الاسماء الحسنی و مظهر نفسک العلی
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for women, @prayer for nearness to God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
